name: Mourning Aix
skill_desc: Transform into Mourning Aix and fire a concentrated beam of Spectro energy, dealing massive DMG in a line. Increases Spectro DMG Bonus by 12% for 15s.
description: A sorrowful echo that weeps beams of pure light. Its mournful cry resonates with the grief of a thousand lost souls, yet its radiance pierces the deepest darkness.
